case_title: JULIANA LAI VS. FUNG LAN LAI ET AL

docket_entries.description: THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF LAI, JULIANA RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT LAI, FUNG LAN YU, YING KI $311.73 PRINCIPAL, $30.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $341.73 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED

PROOF OF SERVICE ON FILE AS TO BOTH DEFENDANTS. EXHIBITS NOT RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: K. DOUGHERTY. NOT REPORTED. (D506).
